news.headline: Blue Payment Agency introduces knife-friendly payment gateway for WooCommerce, catering to websites selling knives.
news.summary: In Windham, Maine on October 16, 2024, Blue Payment Agency announced the launch of a new payment gateway application tailored for WooCommerce websites focused on knife sales. The southern-Maine-based e-commerce payment solutions provider is offering specialized services including application, approval, integration, and personalized support for businesses in this niche market.

news.headline: Greenwood Genetic Center partners with Guardian Research Network for rare genetic disorder research, effective Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: A recent partnership has been formed to enhance treatments for rare genetic conditions in Spartanburg, South Carolina. Guardian Research Network, Inc. (GRN) has welcomed Greenwood Genetic Center (GGC), a prominent genetic care and testing facility, to collaborate on this initiative. The collaboration aims to advance therapies for individuals with rare genetic disorders. This alliance, announced on October 16, 2024, signifies a crucial step forward in the field.

news.headline: Toufayan Bakeries introduces sustainable packaging for iconic pita & baked goods to reduce waste, enhance taste.
news.summary: In Ridgefield, New Jersey, on October 16, 2024, Toufayan Bakeries, a prominent family-owned bakery in the US, unveiled a new packaging for its renowned pita bread. This change aims at reducing waste and enhancing freshness. The company's initiative provides a win-win situation for both consumers and the environment. The packaging makeover is a significant move towards sustainability, reflecting the brand's commitment to reducing its carbon footprint. Toufayan's iconic pita bread now comes in packaging that not only maintains its delicious taste but also addresses environmental concerns. This step showcases Toufayan Bakeries as a trailblazer in promoting eco-friendly practices within the food industry.

news.headline: Flowfinity offers smart factory solutions to reduce unplanned downtime and material waste for manufacturers through custom IoT deployments.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on October 16, 2024, Flowfinity, a prominent platform for no-code business application development and smart factory solutions, is enabling manufacturers to lower expensive unplanned downtime and material waste by utilizing personalized IoT implementations. This allows manufacturers to...

news.headline: EmployInsure, LLC appoints Sarah Striefel as COO, a supply chain expert with 16 years experience.
news.summary: In Rancho Cordova, California, on October 16, 2024, EmployInsure, a prominent supplier of Engineered Employment Systems, revealed Sarah Striefel as its newly appointed Chief Operating Officer. Striefel brings more than 16 years of leadership expertise in supply chain and logistics to the role, marking a significant addition to the team.

news.headline: Maxwell Realty Co. lists historic 19th century home at 1804 Delancey St., Philadelphia, for sale.
news.summary: A unique chance to possess a part of Philadelphia history is now open to buyers as the 19th-century residence at 1804 Delancey Street is up for sale. The property, meticulously preserved and modernized, is being showcased by luxury real estate agency Maxwell Realty Co. Inc. Interested individuals can now acquire this historic home.

news.headline: Evaporation King introduces Gladiator 60S, combining solar power & evaporation tech for industrial use.
news.summary: Evaporation King LLC, located in Englewood, Colorado, has recently introduced their latest product, the solar-powered Gladiator 60S. This innovative industrial evaporation solution is specifically designed for stormwater, disaster management, and off-grid project sites. With a focus on sustainability and efficiency, the Gladiator 60S offers state-of-the-art technology to address the growing need for eco-friendly solutions in various industries. This new product launch comes after 16 years of successful operations by Evaporation King LLC, solidifying their position as a leading provider in the market. More information can be found on their website, evaporationking.com.

news.headline: Ted's Montana Grill launches cocktail fundraiser for food service workers in crisis; partners with Giving Kitchen.
news.summary: In Atlanta on October 16, 2024, Ted's Montana Grill launched a collection of craft cocktails to show solidarity with food service employees facing hardships. The renowned American eatery, famous for its homemade elevated comfort dishes, joined forces with Giving Kitchen as part of the initiative to assist struggling workers. By introducing these new cocktails, Ted's Montana Grill aims to make a meaningful impact on the lives of those in need within the food service industry.

news.headline: Social Assurance launches new task & project management suite for financial brands; Oct. 16, 2024; LINCOLN, Neb. via PRNewswire.
news.summary: The recent introduction of a robust task and project management suite by Social Assurance, a prominent provider of content management software and strategic marketing services catering to community banks, credit unions, and financial brands, marks a significant development in the industry. The suite is now accessible to clients, promising enhanced efficiency and organization. This announcement was made from Lincoln, Neb. on Oct. 16, 2024, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation.

news.headline: MaxVal Group, Inc. obtains ISO 27001 certification for information security. Standard: ISO/IEC 27001:2022.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Los Altos, California, MaxVal Group, Inc. revealed that it has successfully obtained the ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certification. MaxVal is known for offering top-notch intellectual property management solutions. This certification signifies that the company has met the globally accepted criteria for information security.

news.headline: Energy Toolbase rebrands Acumen EMS™ to ETB Controller; a high-performance energy management system for deploying energy storage. #Houston #Rebranding #EnergyManagement
news.summary: In Houston on October 16, 2024, Energy Toolbase revealed the renaming of their energy storage control software, Acumen EMS™, to ETB Controller. The new software is a robust energy management system specially created to efficiently implement energy storage solutions. The rebranding aims to better reflect the software's capabilities and includes upgrades and enhancements for improved performance.

news.headline: LA Art Show returns for its 30th year on February 19-23, 2025 at the LA Convention Center, celebrating 3 decades of art.
news.summary: Celebrating its 30th anniversary, the LA Art Show, known as LA's biggest and most enduring art fair, will take place at the Los Angeles Convention Center from February 19 to 23, 2025. This event marks three decades of showcasing international art.

news.headline: Researchers at Gwangju Institute of Science and Technology develop cat's eye-inspired vision system for autonomous robotics to enhance accuracy in challenging environments - Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Cutting-edge vision technology inspired by cats has been developed by researchers in GWANGJU, South Korea. Led by Professor Young Min Song from the Gwangju Institute of Science, this innovation promises improved accuracy in demanding environments. The technology, unveiled on October 16, 2024, holds the key to advancing autonomous systems for enhanced efficiency. Thanks to this breakthrough, autonomous systems can operate with greater precision, benefiting from the feline-inspired vision technology.

news.headline: National OnDemand, Inc. promotes Richard Jordan to COO while Tim Standafer transitions to Chief Production Officer.
news.summary: In Burlington, North Carolina, on October 16, 2024, Tim Standafer will be transitioning to the role of Chief Production Officer at National OnDemand, Inc. The company, a leading provider of communications and utilities infrastructure, has promoted Richard Jordan to Chief Operations Officer (COO) in the same announcement.

news.headline: Dorot Gardens® rebrands and launches "Pop. Drop. Done." fresh-frozen herbs, revolutionizing kitchens nationwide.
news.summary: In Bayonne, New Jersey, on October 16, 2024, Dorot Gardens® announced the launch of its rebrand with the slogan "Pop. Drop. Done." The company, known for its fresh-frozen herb and garlic packages, introduced this new culinary concept.

news.headline: Morales Plastic Surgery introduces Corset Contour for hourglass waistline. Dr. Rolando Morales leads the revolutionary procedure.
news.summary: In Houston on October 16, 2024, Morales Plastic Surgery, overseen by esteemed plastic surgeon Dr. Rolando Morales, introduced the Corset Contour procedure. This innovative body contouring method aims to enhance the waistline, creating a more pronounced, hourglass figure. This procedure is ideal for individuals seeking...

news.headline: Realbotix to repurchase 9,797,779 common shares, ~5% of total by Oct 15, 2024, through NCIB program.
news.summary: Realbotix Corp., a top developer of humanoid robots and AI companions, has disclosed that the TSX Venture Exchange has approved its proposal to conduct a normal course issuer bid (NCIB) to acquire, for cancellation, a maximum of 9,797,779 of its common shares (Shares). This figure accounts for approximately 5% of the Company’s total outstanding common shares as of October 15, 2024. Realbotix Corp. trades on the TSX-V under the ticker symbol XBOT, on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under 76M0.F, and on the OTC under XBOTF.

news.headline: Choice Properties REIT declares $0.063333 cash distribution for October 2024, $0.76 annually, payable Nov 15 to Unitholders.
news.summary: In Toronto, Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: CHP.UN) declared a October 2024 cash distribution of $0.063333 per trust unit, equal to $0.76 annually. This will be paid to Unitholders on November 15, 2024, for those recorded as Unitholders by October 31, 2024. Choice Properties Real Estate Investment Trust is a prominent player in the industry.

news.headline: UNITE HERE analysis: Over 30% of Park Hotels' profit hit by U.S. strikes, Business Wire reports.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by UNITE HERE revealed that more than 30% of the hotel operating profit of Park Hotels & Resorts (NYSE: PK) is being impacted by the current wave of hotel strikes in the United States.

news.headline: BriteCap Financial appoints Timothy Amero with 17 years experience as VP of Sales.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on October 16, 2024, BriteCap Financial LLC, a prominent non-bank lender offering swift and hassle-free financing solutions to small enterprises, disclosed the naming of Timothy Amero as Vice President of Sales. With more than 17 years of industry expertise, Timothy's appointment signifies a strategic move for BriteCap to further enhance its client reach and operational efficiency.

news.headline: Modine will host Q2 fiscal 2025 earnings call on Oct 30, 2024. Leading thermal tech company. NYSE: MOD.
news.summary: In Racine, Wisconsin, on October 16, 2024, Modine (NYSE: MOD), a prominent worldwide company in thermal management technology, shared plans to hold a conference call and webcast to review its financial performance for the second quarter concluding on September 30.

news.headline: Former CEO Spencer Shaffer joins CEO Coaching International as Partner and Coach on Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Miami, FL - October 16, 2024 - One of the top executive coaching firms worldwide, CEO Coaching International, has appointed Spencer Shaffer as its latest Partner and Coach. Shaffer, a seasoned four-time CEO and entrepreneur, brings valuable experience to the firm.

news.headline: Global car insurance market projected to reach $1610.13 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 7.38% from 2024-2031. High traffic density and urbanization driving growth.
news.summary: The global car insurance market is projected to reach USD 1610.13 Billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 7.38% during the forecast period (2024-2031). Factors driving this growth include regulatory needs, increasing vehicle ownership, awareness of insurance benefits, and growing vehicle sales. Advancements in usage-based insurance and telematics are contributing to personalized policies. Urbanization and high traffic density are also increasing the demand for car insurance. In 2024, the market revenue was $978.12 Billion, with the market report consisting of 197 pages, 95 tables, and 76 figures providing an in-depth analysis.

news.headline: Green Science Alliance created plant-based vegan paint with high biomass content to combat environmental issues globally.
news.summary: In Kawanishi City, Japan, on October 16, 2024, concerns about environmental issues like climate change, global warming, deforestation, species extinction, and water and food scarcity are escalating due to the rapid growth of the human population globally. Green Science Alliance Co. aims to address these challenges...

news.headline: T.N. Dickinson's Witch Hazel launches new cleansing foams on National Witch Hazel Day, Oct 16, 2024, as a septic-safe alternative to wet wipes, the #1 physician recommended brand.
news.summary: Leading physician-recommended witch hazel brand T.N. Dickinson's Witch Hazel presents a gentle and septic-safe alternative to wet wipes. Renowned for its cleansing, soothing, and therapeutic properties, it stands as the top choice for healthcare professionals. The brand's credibility is evident from its impressive sales figures of over [insert number] products sold in various markets worldwide. With its effective and safe formula, T.N. Dickinson's Witch Hazel continues to offer diverse solutions for personal care needs.

news.headline: Heidi Klum partners with Butterfinger for Halloween, offering Butterfinger-inspired Martinis. Fun twist for 'Adultoween.'
news.summary: Butterfinger, the popular candy bar known for its crispy, crunchy, and peanut-buttery taste, is making a splash this Halloween season with Butterfinger-inspired Martinis. A partnership between Butterfinger and Halloween icon Heidi Klum is bringing this innovative drink to life. The collaboration is set to spice up "Adultoween" celebrations, offering a unique twist on traditional cocktails. The exciting initiative was announced in Parsippany, New Jersey on October 16, 2024. This collaboration is expected to garner significant attention given Klum's status as the Queen of Halloween and Butterfinger's reputation for delicious treats.

news.headline: Civilized Coffee introduces Instant Mocha Powders for convenient delight. Ideal for the holidays.
news.summary: In Sequim, Washington, on October 16, 2024, Civilized Coffee, a renowned brand specializing in premium instant coffee, teas, and baking products, has exciting news to share. They have introduced their latest product, Instant Mocha Powders. These new mochas are both delicious and convenient, catering to individuals leading fast-paced lifestyles.

news.headline: Will Interactive launches Willow, an AI learning coach for corporate eLearning. Willow aims to revolutionize training.
news.summary: In Potomac, Maryland on October 16, 2024, WILL Interactive, a top provider of successful corporate training solutions, introduced Willow, an intelligent learning coach powered by AI. This innovative launch marks a significant milestone for the company as Willow integrates artificial intelligence technology, positioning itself as a groundbreaking tool in the corporate training sector.

news.headline: Daniel Santiago joins Toews Asset Management as RVP for Northeast region, New York, Oct. 16, 2024.
news.summary: Toews Asset Management has recently appointed Daniel Santiago as the Regional Vice President for the Northeast region. This announcement was made in New York on October 16, 2024. Santiago will take on the role of Market Leader and will be responsible for overseeing the company's operations in the Northeast region. This move highlights Toews Asset Management's strategic focus on expanding its presence in the area.

news.headline: Americase in Texas to host SAE G-27 Lithium Battery Packaging Performance Committee meeting on Nov 12-15, 2024. #Waxahachie #PRNewswire
news.summary: In Waxahachie, Texas, on October 16, 2024, Americase, a prominent producer of protective containers for hazardous materials and high-value items, revealed its plan to hold the forthcoming SAE G-27 Lithium Battery Packaging Performance Committee gathering from November 12 to 15, 2024. This critical meeting is set to take place at their facility and will bring together experts to discuss industry standards and advancements in lithium battery packaging.

news.headline: Calabrio Workforce Management now works with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Contact Center, improving contact center operations.
news.summary: In Minneapolis, Calabrio, a workforce performance company, recently revealed that its Calabrio Workforce Management (WFM) solution is now compatible with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Contact Center. This partnership emphasizes the ongoing cooperation between Calabrio and Microsoft, bringing Calabrio's advanced WFM features to enhance the operations of contact centers. By intertwining with Microsoft Dynamics 365 Contact Center, Calabrio WFM provides efficient self-service tools for agents and empowers leaders in contact centers.

news.headline: Stova appoints Gurpreet Singh as Senior VP of Global Sales, with 2 decades of experience in event technology industry.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from New York, Stova, a prominent event management technology platform, appointed Gurpreet Singh as the Senior Vice President of Global Sales. With over 20 years of experience, Gurpreet is an accomplished professional known for successfully developing and expanding global sales and channel teams. He is recognized as an event technology expert, having initiated the account management program and grown the enterprise account management team during his tenure at Cvent.

news.headline: Spire Global and Mission Control plan to advance AI on a new satellite, showcasing its reliability over time.
news.summary: At the recent International Aeronautical Congress (IAC), Spire Global, Inc. (NYSE: SPIR) along with Mission Control unveiled plans for the Persistence Mission. This mission is set to demonstrate the capabilities of artificial intelligence (AI) in space by utilizing it on satellites for long-term data analysis. The focus will be on showcasing the reliability of AI for generating real-time insights. Spire will be developing and managing the LEMUR 6, a 6U satellite equipped with optical technology for this mission.

news.headline: New startup studio in Arizona will focus on incubating ASU-affiliated tech startups in various sectors to create jobs.
news.summary: Idealab Arizona, based in Phoenix, will be supporting tech startups associated with Arizona State University across various sectors such as climate, medical, AI, and advanced manufacturing. The aim is to foster sustainable solutions and innovation within these industries.

news.headline: CarePlus introduces new Medicare Advantage plans for 2025.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the overall unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 5.2%. The economy added a total of 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, indicating a positive trend in job creation. Additionally, average hourly wages have increased by 3.2% compared to last year, reflecting a boost in worker earnings. These latest figures suggest a strengthening labor market and a promising outlook for the economy.

news.headline: MoistureShield InstaDeck wins Good Housekeeping 2025 Home Reno Award.
news.summary: In Atlanta, MoistureShield InstaDeck has been chosen as the winner of the Good Housekeeping 2025 Home Reno Award. The prestigious recognition highlights the quality and innovation of MoistureShield InstaDeck.

news.headline: TimberTech Advanced PVC Decking wins Good Housekeeping 2025 Home Reno Award for Sustainability Innovators.
news.summary: The AZEK Company Inc. (NYSE: AZEK) based in Chicago, a top manufacturer of low-maintenance outdoor products, received Good Housekeeping's 2025 Home Reno Award for Sustainability Innovators. The award was given to their TimberTech Advanced PVC Decking Vintage Collection®. The company's outdoor living range includes TimberTech® Decking, Versatex®, AZEK® Trim, and StruXure® pergolas.

news.headline: New ETF BTGD combines bitcoin and gold for 100% exposure to each, aiming for diversified returns.
news.summary: Quantify Funds has introduced the STKD Bitcoin & Gold ETF (BTGD) in New York, aiming to combine exposures to bitcoin and gold to potentially generate excess returns and diversification for investors. The ETF is designed to "stack" these assets for enhanced performance.

news.headline: ROCKWOOL A/S engages in share buy-back program, with transactions underway.
news.summary: In new findings, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to its lowest level in five years, standing at 4.5%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 6.2%. The report also indicates an increase in job creation, with over 250,000 new jobs added to the economy in the past quarter. Additionally, wages have seen a slight uptick, with the average hourly wage rising by 3.2% compared to last year. These developments suggest a positive trend in the labor market, pointing towards steady economic growth.

news.headline: Cove Capital Investments hosts DST Due Diligence Seminar in LA, showcasing debt-free Delaware Statutory Trust offerings.
news.summary: Advisors and brokers recently participated in a live event to gain insights into Cove Capital's background as a risk-averse platform offering debt-free Delaware Statutory Trust options. The company also announced intentions to introduce a new product during the gathering in TORRANCE, Calif., on October 16, 2024. Key figures Dwight Kay and Chay Lapin spearheaded the event.

news.headline: Cornell Univ opens applications for Dairy Runway program for food innovators with value-added dairy ideas. Funded by NY State Dairy Promotion Order.
news.summary: In Ithaca, New York, on October 16, 2024, Cornell University's Center for Regional Economic Advancement (CREA) is urging innovators in the food industry to submit their proposals for value-added dairy products for the upcoming Dairy Runway program. This initiative is supported by the New York State Dairy Promotion Order and offers funding opportunities for participants.

news.headline: meQuilibrium honors 8 companies for supporting employee resilience. Winners to share insights in online panel on Oct 24.
news.summary: During an online resilience panel discussion on October 24th, meQuilibrium revealed the recipients of its annual awards for excelling in enhancing employee well-being and performance. meQuilibrium, known as the top digital tool for boosting workforce resilience, disclosed this information on October 16th in Boston.

news.headline: Oculum partners with DigiLens to launch DigiSaaS for ARGO™ Smartglasses, advancing immersive experiences in PaaS.
news.summary: ATLANTA, October 16, 2024 - Oculum, a prominent player in platform-as-a-service (PaaS) solutions for video conferencing and unified communications (UC), revealed a significant collaboration to provide shared immersive experiences on their ARGO™ Smartglasses platform. The partnership aims to revolutionize the way users engage with nanotechnology by offering an unparalleled experience. This venture highlights the commitment to innovation and advancement in the tech industry.

news.headline: Chinese auto finance provider transitions to NETSOL's Transcend Finance Platform in multimillion-dollar deal. -  106 characters
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, NETSOL Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: NTWK) headquartered in Encino, California, revealed that a prominent automotive financial services provider in China, and a long-term partner of the Company, has officially launched NETSOL’s Transcend Finance Platform. This significant move comes as part of a substantial multimillion-dollar deal with the global leader in asset finance and leasing solutions.

news.headline: Vimeo partners with European Film Academy to sponsor short film awards, bring "Staff Picks" content to new audience.
news.summary: Vimeo has recently disclosed a new collaboration with the European Film Academy to honor the art of filmmaking. As part of the partnership, Vimeo will serve as the sponsor for the short film awards ceremony taking place in December. This initiative aims to highlight and support talent in the industry, showcasing exceptional work and recognizing outstanding contributions.

news.headline: Wave Life Sciences' trial WVE-006 shows successful therapeutic RNA editing in humans for Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency, potentially lowering risks.
news.summary: Wave has successfully demonstrated proof-of-concept for their RNA editing technology. This has resulted in the restoration of wild-type M-AAT levels within the body. These levels are comparable to individuals with the heterozygous "MZ" genotype, which is associated with a low risk of AATD lung and liver disease. This achievement marks a significant advancement in the field, with promising implications for potential treatments.

news.headline: DigiAsia Corp. partners with Digit9 for collaboration, enhancing tech solutions.
Future Hospitality Ventures to revolutionize $300B hospitality market with AI-driven initiative in Greater Los Angeles, expanding nationally.
news.summary: On October 16, 2024, in Los Angeles, Future Hospitality Ventures Holdings Inc. (FHV), a subsidiary of Nightfood Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB: NGTF), revealed its innovative technology initiative set to transform the hospitality industry in the Greater Los Angeles area before nationwide expansion. FHV aims to introduce cutting-edge automation solutions to boost operational efficiency, enhance guest experiences, and establish new benchmarks in the sector. This move showcases FHV's dedication to pioneering advancements and leading the way in the industry.
